_note: Sparse hints for known FC targets. Omit rather than guess. Users can fill gaps via cli().

MATEKF405.notes: Popular F4 FC. DSHOT600 works on all motor outputs. Good UART count.

MATEKF722.notes: F7 FC. DSHOT600 on all outputs. Supports bidirectional DSHOT.

MATEKH743.notes: H7 FC. Fast, high UART count. Full DSHOT600 bidirectional support.

SPEEDYBEEF405WING.notes: Fixed-wing focused F4 board. Good servo output count. DSHOT on motor outputs.

TBS_LUCID_H7.notes: FC in the TBS Chupito flying-wing kit. H7 class, full DSHOT support (DSHOT300 in stock TBS config). Stock Chupito tune ships on iNAV 8.x as an AIRPLANE/elevon wing.
